fields.name: Slack
fields.description: Send messages, search channels, and read conversations in your Slack workspace using your personal token.

required_credentials.label: User OAuth Token
required_credentials.helpText: Your personal Slack User OAuth Token (starts with xoxp-)

fields.name: GitHub
fields.description: Search repositories, manage issues and pull requests, view code, and interact with GitHub from your conversations.

required_credentials.label: Personal Access Token
required_credentials.helpText: Your GitHub Personal Access Token (classic or fine-grained)

fields.setup_guide:
## Getting a GitHub Personal Access Token

1. Go to [GitHub Settings → Personal Access Tokens](https://github.com/settings/tokens)

2. Click **Generate new token** → Choose **Fine-grained** (recommended) or **Classic**

3. For Fine-grained tokens:
   - Set a descriptive name (e.g., "DARE MCP")
   - Set expiration (90 days recommended)
   - Select repositories you want to access
   - Under Permissions, grant:
     - **Contents**: Read and write
     - **Issues**: Read and write
     - **Pull requests**: Read and write
     - **Metadata**: Read-only (automatically selected)

4. For Classic tokens, select scopes:
   - `repo` (full repository access)
   - `read:org` (optional, for organization access)

5. Click **Generate token** and copy it immediately!

fields.name: SyftBox
fields.description: Connect your SyftBox datasite. Use OTP verification to link storage and access distributed files.
fields.setup_guide:
## SyftBox

Open this server to verify with OTP and connect your SyftBox account. No API keys are stored here for this integration.

fields.name: Consensus
fields.description: Search peer-reviewed research papers with filters for study type, publication year, human studies, sample size, and medical mode.
fields.setup_guide:
## Consensus MCP

Consensus exposes a hosted Streamable HTTP MCP server at `https://mcp.consensus.app/mcp`.

Consensus requires OAuth for the live MCP endpoint. DARE will dynamically register an OAuth client when the first user connects, then each user signs in with their own Consensus account.

fields.name: Scite
fields.description: Search scientific literature and inspect citation context, including supporting, mentioning, and contrasting Smart Citation signals.
fields.setup_guide:
## Scite MCP

Scite exposes a hosted Streamable HTTP MCP server at `https://api.scite.ai/mcp` and requires a Scite subscription for MCP access.

Before users can connect through DARE, register DARE as an OAuth client with Scite or add a client ID issued by Scite in the admin panel.
